dailyNews.title: Lessons from the 1970s help U.S. and global economies absorb oil shocks
dailyNews.description: Economies are less vulnerable now than they were when a similar war in West Asia drove up fuel prices, triggering stagflation in the 1970s; decades of reforms have improved efficiency, cut reliance on West Asian oil, built reserves, and expanded alternative energy, but oil is still king, say experts

dailyNews.title: Oil back above $100 as US to blockade Iranian ports after peace talks fail
dailyNews.description: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.

dailyNews.title: Is a blockade an act of war? Here's what we know as Trump moves to block the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: During the Cuban Missile Crisis, for example, the Kennedy Administration was careful to label its naval action to stop further deliveries by Soviet ships a ‘quarantine.’ The reason for this was that a ‘blockade’ is an act of war under international law.

dailyNews.title: Iran taunts US over Strait of Hormuz blockade, fuel prices: Internet reacts to viral post, ‘Americans would survive…’
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz is vital to global oil shipments, and any blockade could cause sharp price increases. On 13 April, the Speaker of Iran's Parliament shared a screenshot of current petrol prices at Washington DC fuel stations.

dailyNews.title: The AI you use every day is biased — and it’s quietly shaping your worldview, new report says
dailyNews.description: AI models show a center-left ideological bias across the spectrum, according to an America First Policy Institute report on AI transparency and safety.

dailyNews.description: Multiple women accuse Rep. Eric Swalwell of sexual misconduct as the former gubernatorial frontrunner suspends his campaign for California's highest office.

dailyNews.description: Brian Hooker remains in a Freeport, Bahamas jail as police investigate the disappearance of his wife off Elbow Cay.

dailyNews.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani highlights major policy wins in his first 100 days, crediting a democratic socialist agenda as Bernie Sanders praises the approach.

dailyNews.description: Heidi Klum was barely recognizable at Coachella in a jet black wig and sheer white gown, dubbing her desert look "Techno Hexen" on social media Saturday.

dailyNews.description: Pope Leo has been critical of the war in Iran and other priorities of the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: 4/12: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks collapse; oil prices fueling inflation amid Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran war as Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: A marathon round of talks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend failed to produce a peace agreement, leading President Trump to announce a bloackade of the Strait of Hormuz. Imtiaz Tyab and Taurean Small have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz, intercept ships that paid Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. Navy will begin blockading ships from entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz and intercept vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Iran's parliament speaker says U.S. will be "nostalgic" for $4 gas as oil prices fuel inflation
dailyNews.description: Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf said Americans would soon be "nostalgic for $4-$5 gas" after President Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday. Taurean Small reports on the pain at the pump currently being felt across the United States.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks collapse
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the United States will blockade the Strait of Hormuz, stepping up pressure on Iran after peace talks in Pakistan ended without a breakthrough. Imtiaz Tyab has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says price of oil may rise after peace talks between the U.S. and Iran collapse
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the price of oil may be “a little bit higher” and doubled down on comments that Iranian civilization “will die” unless the regime caves to his demands. His comments come after peace talks between the U.S. and Iran failed over the weekend. NBC News’ Julie Tsikrin has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Viktor Orbán concedes election defeat in a blow to Hungary's far right
dailyNews.description: Peter Magyar's center-right Tisza party is projected to win Hungary's parliamentary election, bringing an end to 16 years of authoritarian rule under Viktor Orbán, a far-right ally of both President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't 'care' if Iran returns to talks
dailyNews.description: Trump says he doesn't 'care' if Iran returns to talks
